concerns.text: SC-001 (Volume >1,000) and SC-002 (Family Split) lack executable tasks. T013d is marked [X] but explicitly states it 'does NOT perform the final checksum verification or volume check'. T013e (verification) and T017 (split generation) are marked [ ] (incomplete). Without completing T013e and T017, the pipeline cannot generate the validated `graphs_v1.parquet` or `split_indices.json` required to satisfy SC-001 and SC-002.

SC-002 (Inter-family generalization) and SC-003 (Inference <100ms) are not fully covered. T018b (Training) is marked [ ] (incomplete). T020 (K-fold CV) and T021a (Inter-family test) are marked [ ] (incomplete). T036 (Inference benchmark) is marked [X] but depends on T018b (training) which is incomplete. No task exists to actually execute the inter-family generalization test defined in SC-002 if T021a remains unimplemented.

SC-005 (3 descriptors with p<0.05) lacks a complete execution path. T023 (SHAP p-values) and T024 (Permutation p-values) are marked [ ] (incomplete). T027c (Report generation with p-value filtering) and T027d (Execution) are marked [ ] (incomplete). The pipeline cannot produce the `feature_importance_report.md` required by Deliverable 4 or verify SC-005 without these tasks.

Constitution FR-030 (Terminology) and Spec Limitations require strict adherence. Tasks T029-T041 (Documentation updates, Terminology scanning, Review Response) are all marked [ ] (incomplete). Without these, the project cannot satisfy the 'Critical Distinction' in the Spec Overview or the 'Limitations' section requirements, leaving the project in a state of potential scientific misrepresentation.

T003a and T003b (Linting/Formatting config) are marked [ ] (incomplete) but are prerequisites for code quality. While not blocking FRs directly, their incompleteness prevents the 'Setup' phase from being considered 'complete' as claimed in the Phase 1 header, creating a false sense of readiness.
